content:
# elizaos/cloud Daily Update (Apr 20, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 20, 2026, focused on expanding authentication capabilities for the elizaos/cloud repository. The team introduced new pull requests to integrate multi-chain wallet sign-in and enhance server-side token management.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*No completed work was recorded for this date.*

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **Authentication and Identity Integration:**
    *   [#462](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/462): Introduced wallet sign-in functionality supporting both EVM and Solana, alongside GitHub OAuth integration.
    *   [#461](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/461): Implemented server-side Steward token refresh logic within the edge proxy to improve session management.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*None.*

## NEW ISSUES
*None.*

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*None.*
